0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Get Mnemosyne v3.11.0 running in under 5 minutes. If you haven't installed yet, see the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," first."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne installed (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pipx install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}],")"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Your First Memories"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Store a memory with entity extraction\nmem.remember(\n  \"Alice prefers dark mode for the UI. She's the project lead.\",\n  extract_entities=True,\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n\n# Store with LLM fact extraction\nmem.remember(\n  \"The deadline was moved to June 15th.\",\n  extract=True,\n)\n\n# Temporal recall — find what happened recently\nresults = mem.recall(\"UI preferences\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"[{r['score']:.3f}] {r['content']}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configurable Retrieval"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v3 lets you tune scoring weights per query:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Boost text matching over semantic similarity\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"exact error code E501\",\n  vec_weight=20.0,\n  fts_weight=60.0,\n  importance_weight=20.0,\n)\n\n# Emphasize very recent memories\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"what did we discuss today?\",\n  temporal_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_halflife=24.0,  # 24-hour half-life\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Banks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Isolate memories for different projects or contexts:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Create a bank for work projects\nwork_mem = Mnemosyne(bank=\"work\")\nwork_mem.remember(\"Deployed v3.11.0 to staging.\")\n\n# Separate bank for personal\npersonal_mem = Mnemosyne(bank=\"personal\")\npersonal_mem.remember(\"Dentist appointment on Friday.\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What's Next?"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Read the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," for setup options, extras, and Hermes integration"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Explore the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/api/python-sdk","children":"Python SDK Reference"}]," for the full API"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Learn about the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/beam-overview","children":"BEAM Architecture"}]," to understand how memory works"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["See ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/retrieval/hybrid-search","children":"Hybrid Search"}]," for retrieval tuning details"]}],"\n"]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
